examples: Ironically, for a man who hated war, he would have made a superb war cameraman.
Ironically, the book she felt was her worst sold more copies than any of her others.
Ironically, he could not draw particularly well.
Ironically, the show itself was based on the British sitcom Till Death Us Do Part.
Ironically, it became a victim of its own success, not willing or capable to change.
